data.title: Open-Label Rollover Study for Continuing NBI-98854 Administration for the Treatment of Pediatric Subjects With Tourette Syndrome
data.brief_summary: This is an open-label, rollover study to collect long-term safety, tolerability, and investigator- and participant-reported pharmacodynamic (PD) data after chronic administration of NBI-98854 in pediatric participants with Tourette Syndrome (TS), as well as to provide open-label access to NBI-98854 for the treatment of TS for pediatric participants who have taken part in a Phase 2 NBI-98854 study.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

1. Have a clinical diagnosis of Tourette Syndrome (TS)
2. Have participated in the NBI-98854-TS2004 or NBI 98854-TS2005 Phase 2 studies
3. If using maintenance medication(s) for TS and/or TS spectrum diagnoses (e.g. obsessive-compulsive disorder \[OCD\], Attention-Deficit Hypera
endpoints: Number of Participants With Treatment-Emergent Adverse Events (TEAEs)
